LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ERIC GARRETT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS PROCEDURALLY DEFECTIVE UNDER CCP 437C BECAUSE IT DOES NOT INCLUDE A SEPARATE STATEMENT OF UNDISPUTED FACTS. IN ADDITION, THE DECLARATIONS THAT DEFENDANT CITES ARE IN CONFLICT AND CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING EXACTLY WHAT OCCURRED ON MAY 12, 2014. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Continue Trial And Extend Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Set For Trial On Sep-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rick Qureshi Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
Eric Garrett telephone number 415-767-6562 Defendant in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that notice was not provided of any party's intent to argue the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ERIC GARRETT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant's motion is procedurally defective under CCP 437c because it does not include a separate statement of undisputed facts. In addition, the declarations that defendant cites are in conflict and create a triable issue of material fact regarding exactly what occurred on May 12, 2014. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Set For Trial On May-09-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Off Calendar

Motice Of Motion And Motion: (1) To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And (2) For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rick Qureshi Plaintiff in Propria Persona. Eric Garrett Defendant in Propria Persona.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, PLAINTIFF RICK QURESHI'S Motion: (1) To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And (2) For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant was granted in part and denied in part. The Court will issue an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Sigird Irias. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
